name: Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over chocolate and stir until smooth and thick. Cool.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together.
3. Cream shortening with brown sugar until fluffy.
4. Add eggs and beat thoroughly.
5. Blend in vanilla extract.
6. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients and sour milk alternately, beating well after each addition.
7. Pour batter into greased pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Makes 3 (8 inch) layers.
